ability: 每个夜晚，你会得知有多少名玩家在当晚因其自身能力而被唤醒。
firstNightReminder: Show the Daredevil the number of players that 唤醒 due to their ability.

flavor: Yeah, the accident blinded me. It just also uh, sharpened my other senses.
